name: Hamid Drake
abstract: Hamid Drake (born August 3, 1955) is an American jazz drummer and percussionist. By the close of the 1990s, Hamid Drake was widely regarded as one of the best percussionists in jazz and improvised music.

about_quotes.speaker: David Murray
about_quotes.evidence: my nucleus is my quartet. Hamid Drake and Jaribu Shahid, as a trio. I mean those two guys are pretty much my nucleus in everything that I’m doing right now.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Murray interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 18, 2003
